mxCell.value:
Abbreviations
FCPA Fluids Control and Pump Assembly
PCPA Pressure Control and Pump Assembly
PPSA Purge Pump and Separator Assembly
SPA Separator Plumbing Assembly

Notes
The steam condensate at node 0 is a non-condensable gas from the Distillation Assembly (DA).  The transition from steam condensate to urine distillate occurs at nodes 3 and 4.

In the real world, the PCPA converts steam condensate from the DA to a mixture of steam condensate and urine distillate. However, the SteamCondensateUrineDistillate liquid state isn't used in the network because GUNNS doesn't support two-phase flow. This means that although a liquid and gas may be present in the same network, they may not both be present in the same node or flow.
